title: Starlink Hits Pause on Extra $10 Rental Kit Fee for Dish Hardware
summary: The $10 "monthly kit fee" that Starlink introduced for new Residential sign-ups has quietly been rescinded. But the kit fee was added last month, a few days before SpaceX went public.
caption: output/2026-07-19/starlink-hits-pause-on-extra-10-rental-kit-fee-for-dish-hardware.txt
